name: io.github.ThoTischner/observability-mcp
description: Unified observability gateway for AI agents — Prometheus, Loki & more, with anomaly detection.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'stdio' when an MCP client spawns the package directly (the npx default starts the HTTP gateway + Web UI on :3000 instead).

environmentVariables.name: PROMETHEUS_URL
environmentVariables.description: Prometheus base URL to connect as a metrics source (optional; sources are also configurable via the Web UI / sources.yaml).

environmentVariables.name: LOKI_URL
environmentVariables.description: Loki base URL to connect as a logs source (optional).
